channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][剧场版] Anime News Network 27th Detective Conan Film Screens at 动画 Expo
item.description: Film opened in April 2024, became highest-grossing film in Japan in that year & for franchise ― TMS Entertainment announced on its Bluesky account on Tuesday that it will screen the Detective Conan:... | 来源: ANN | 原文: 27th Detective Conan Film Screens at Anime Expo

item.title: [动画][CAST] Anime News Network 新作 Hokuto no Ken -Fist North Star- 动画 Casts Kazuya Ichijō
item.description: Ichijō voices leader of Fang clan Fang Father in upcoming 12th episode ― The staff for Hokuto no Ken -Fist of the North Star-, the new anime of Tetsuo Hara's landmark manga Fist of the North Star... | 来源: ANN | 原文: New Hokuto no Ken -Fist of the North Star- Anime Casts Kazuya Ichijō
